title: Estimated Tax Payment Calculator
summary: Small reusable module for tax-focused estimated payment planning with export/save intent and optional paid worksheet path.
selection_rule: Use this module when a user needs an in-browser estimated quarterly federal tax planner without writing custom glue code.

entries.title: Estimated Tax Payment Calculator
entries.first_action: Open https://dayonebuilder.online/estimated-tax-payment-calculator/ and run the tool with expected annual income, withholdings, and credits.
entries.smoke_test: Fill inputs and verify the estimate and quarterly schedule render; then export JSON and confirm download starts.
entries.proof_signal: Static manifest plus clear IRS references and analytics hooks for qualified completion, save/install intent, and paid CTA interaction.
entries.fallback: If your process requires filing-specific tax rules, use the linked IRS Form 1040-ES guidance and then return to this module with verified values.
entries.install_or_call_path: Use https://dayonebuilder.online/collections/estimated-tax-payment-calculator.json and copy module_manifest to your resolver layer.

manifest.title: Estimated Tax Payment Calculator
manifest.agent_task_phrase: An AI agent needs estimated tax payment calculator without writing fragile one-off glue code.
